Package org.areslib.core

Class TunableNumber

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.core.TunableNumber
public class TunableNumber extends Object
A runtime-tunable number backed by FTC Dashboard for live PID tuning.

Wraps a double value that can be changed live from the FTC Dashboard web interface without redeploying code. The value is published to telemetry on creation and on each change, allowing live monitoring and adjustment.

Per-Consumer Change Tracking: Multiple consumers (e.g., a PID controller and a feedforward model) can independently track whether they've seen the latest value using hasChanged(int). Each consumer is identified by a unique integer ID.

Usage: 


 TunableNumber kP = new TunableNumber("Drive/kP", 0.1);
 TunableNumber kD = new TunableNumber("Drive/kD", 0.01);

 // In periodic():
 if (kP.hasChanged(hashCode())) {
     drivePid.setP(kP.get());
 }

  • Field Details

    • dumpJsonNow

      public static boolean dumpJsonNow
      FTC Dashboard Button Hook. Toggle to true in the dashboard web interface to trigger a system-wide log dump sequence of all tuned constants. Resets to false automatically.

  • Constructor Details

    • TunableNumber

      public TunableNumber(String key, double defaultValue)
      Constructs a TunableNumber with a dashboard key and default value.
      Parameters:
      key - The telemetry key used for display and editing (e.g., "Drive/kP").
      defaultValue - The initial value.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public double get()
      Gets the current value.
      Returns:
      The current tunable value.

    • set

      public void set(double value)
      Sets the value programmatically and publishes it.
      Parameters:
      value - The new value.

    • hasChanged

      public boolean hasChanged(int id)
      Returns true if the value has changed since the last time this specific consumer checked. Each consumer is tracked independently by the provided ID.

      Students: Use this.hashCode() or a constant int as the consumer ID. This allows multiple subsystems to independently detect tunable changes without interfering with each other.

      Parameters:
      id - A unique identifier for the consumer (e.g., this.hashCode()).
      Returns:
      Whether the current value differs from the last value seen by this consumer.

    • getDefault

      public double getDefault()
      Returns the default value this tunable was constructed with.
      Returns:
      The default value.

    • getKey

      public String getKey()
      Returns the dashboard key for this tunable number.
      Returns:
      The key.

    • dumpAllJson

      public static String dumpAllJson()
      Generates a formatted JSON string of all current active Tunable constants. Useful for dumping final tuned PID values and quickly copy-pasting them straight into your permanent source Constants.java file.
      Returns:
      JSON formatted dump.

    • toString

      public String toString()
